svg.text: Dense capability map with stacked sub-domains, shared enablers, and sparse dependencies

g.text: Stress test: many domains and stacked cards should remain readable.
Relationships remain sparse; dense overlays belong in a separate dependency
Connector lines should stay in row gaps.
Shared enabler links use lane offsets when a corridor repeats.

svg.text: Stress template: large capability maps should use alignment first and sparse connectors second.
